metadata.description: Azure region for all resources.
Short lowercase-alphanumeric prefix used to name all resources.
Container image reference (without tag) in the internal ACR. Typically "<acr-login-server>/kmp".
Image tag to deploy (e.g. "nightly" or "nightly-2026-04-17").
Release channel exposed to the application runtime.
Runtime environment exposed as KMP_ENV.
Postgres admin login name.
Postgres admin password (also used as the application credential for nightly — no separate app role).
Postgres application database name.
Postgres platform metadata database name. Platform schedules, tenants, jobs, and secret metadata live here.
PostgreSQL Flexible Server compute SKU.
PostgreSQL Flexible Server compute tier.
PostgreSQL storage size in GB.
PostgreSQL backup retention in days.
Enable geographically redundant PostgreSQL backups when supported by the region.
PostgreSQL high-availability mode. Burstable SKUs should use Disabled.
CakePHP Security.salt value (generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`).
Backup encryption key. Must match the key used to bake the nightly .kmpbackup file. Keep this in sync with deploy/azure/seed/.
Master key used by the database-backed platform secret store. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.
SMTP host for outbound mail (e.g. Mailpit reused from UAT).
SMTP port for outbound mail.
SMTP username (leave empty for unauthenticated Mailpit).
SMTP password (leave empty for unauthenticated Mailpit).
Whether SMTP uses TLS.
From address for outgoing mail.
Object ID of the principal that should have Key Vault Secrets Officer access for initial secret population (usually the deployer).
ACR name. Must be pre-computed by the bootstrap script so that the image can be imported before the rest of the deployment runs.
Storage account redundancy SKU for tenant documents.
Soft-delete retention for tenant document blobs and containers.
Key Vault soft-delete retention.
Enable Key Vault purge protection.
Provision Azure Managed Redis for shared caches and sessions.
Azure Managed Redis SKU.
Azure Managed Redis clustering policy. KMP requires NoCluster because CakePHP uses a single-node Redis client.
Enable Azure Managed Redis data replication.
Reuse Redis connections across requests handled by the same PHP worker.
Enable host-based tenant resolution.
Enable the isolated platform administration portal.
Comma-separated platform administration hosts. When empty, the Container App default hostname is used.
Optional Container App custom domains. Each item must be { name: string, hostName: string } and have valid CNAME/asuid DNS records.
Provision a workspace-based Application Insights component and wire it to the application.
Enable request, performance, error, and sampled SQL telemetry when Application Insights is enabled.
Application Insights export transport. Use otlp with the Container Apps managed OpenTelemetry agent.
Percentage of SQL query telemetry sent to Application Insights.
Deploy a copy of the KMP telemetry workbook bound to this environment Application Insights component.
Enable the platform data console.
Minimum web replicas.
Maximum web replicas.
Whether to provision Azure Front Door in front of the Container App.
Front Door SKU to use when deployFrontDoor is true.
Optional custom domains for Front Door. Each item should be { name: string, hostName: string }. DNS/certificate validation remains an operational step.
Global switch for provisioning Container Apps Jobs. Jobs are fixed schedule shapes; tenant fan-out happens in platform schedules and queue tables.
Enable the manual migration/canary job.
Enable the manual restore-from-seed job.
Enable the manual tenant provision job shape. Operators override args when starting it for a specific tenant.
Enable the unified scheduled background worker for due schedules, default and tenant queues, and platform jobs.
Cron for the unified background worker.
Maximum concurrent queue worker replicas per scheduled execution.
Replica timeout, in seconds, for each unified worker execution.
Enable the legacy hourly platform schedule dispatcher job.
Cron for the due platform schedule dispatcher.
Enable the daily platform schedule dispatcher job.
Cron for the daily platform schedule dispatcher.
Enable the weekly platform schedule dispatcher job.
Cron for the weekly platform schedule dispatcher.
Enable the nightly maintenance platform schedule dispatcher job.
Cron for the nightly maintenance platform schedule dispatcher.
Maximum concurrent replicas for each platform schedule dispatcher execution. Keep at 1 unless schedule rows are idempotent.

{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# KMP Telemetry Dashboard
Health, performance, and capacity decisions driven by structured `customDimensions` emitted by the KMP performance middleware (`telemetry_schema_version=1`).

Use the filters to scope by **time range**, **kingdom**, and the **projection multiplier** for scaling extrapolations. Methodology and data dictionary: [docs/7.8-performance-sizing.md](https://github.com/ansteorra/KMP/blob/main/docs/7.8-performance-sizing.md)."},"name":"intro"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"p-time","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":14400000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000}]}},{"id":"p-kingdom","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"Kingdom","type":2,"isRequired":false,"multiSelect":true,"quote":"'","delimiter":",","value":["*"],"typeSettings":{"additionalResourceOptions":["value::all"],"selectAllValue":"*","showDefault":false},"query":"union (print kingdom='*'), (traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom) | where isnotempty(kingdom) | summarize by kingdom) | order by kingdom asc","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},{"id":"p-multiplier","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"KingdomMultiplier","label":"Project to N kingdoms","type":1,"isRequired":true,"value":"30"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## At a glance"},"name":"h-glance"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize Requests = count()","size":3,"title":"Requests","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},"name":"stat-requests","customWidth":"25"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize ['p95 ms'] = round(percentile(duration_ms, 95), 1)","size":3,"title":"p95 duration (ms)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},"name":"stat-p95","customWidth":"25"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| where status >= 400
| summarize Errors = count()","size":3,"title":"Errors (4xx/5xx)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},"name":"stat-errors","customWidth":"25"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'telemetry-health'
| extend dropped = toint(customDimensions.dropped), failed = toint(customDimensions.failed)
| summarize ['Failed+Dropped'] = sum(failed) + sum(dropped)","size":3,"title":"Exporter dropped","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},"name":"stat-exporter","customWidth":"25"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Operational health"},"name":"h-health"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where severityLevel >= 2
| extend channel = tostring(customDimensions.channel)
| summarize events = count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), channel
| render columnchart","size":0,"title":"Errors and warnings over time","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},"name":"errors-time","customWidth":"60"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'telemetry-health'
| extend
    sent = toint(customDimensions.sent),
    failed = toint(customDimensions.failed),
    dropped = toint(customDimensions.dropped),
    flush_count = toint(customDimensions.flush_count),
    flush_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.flush_total_ms),
    source_channel = tostring(customDimensions.source_channel)
| summarize
    Sent = sum(sent),
    Failed = sum(failed),
    Dropped = sum(dropped),
    Flushes = sum(flush_count),
    ['Avg flush ms'] = round(avg(flush_total_ms / iff(flush_count == 0, 1.0, todouble(flush_count))), 2)
    by ['Source channel'] = source_channel
| order by Sent desc","size":0,"title":"Telemetry exporter health (per source channel)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","gridSettings":{"formatters":[]}},"name":"exporter-health","customWidth":"40"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where severityLevel >= 2
| extend
    channel = tostring(customDimensions.channel),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path)
| project timestamp, ['Severity'] = severityLevel, channel, kingdom, route_template, path, message
| top 50 by timestamp desc","size":0,"title":"Recent errors and warnings","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},"name":"recent-errors"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Performance"},"name":"h-perf"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize
    p50 = percentile(duration_ms, 50),
    p95 = percentile(duration_ms, 95),
    p99 = percentile(duration_ms, 99)
    by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Request latency percentiles (ms)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},"name":"latency"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend

| extend status_class = strcat(tostring(status / 100), 'xx')
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), status_class
| render columnchart","size":0,"title":"HTTP status code mix","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},"name":"status","customWidth":"50"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend

    by ['Route'] = route_template

| order by ['Memory MB bucket'] asc
| render barchart","size":0,"title":"Memory peak distribution (MB)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},"name":"memory-dist","customWidth":"50"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),

    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| extend bucket = case(
    response_bytes < 1024, '<1 KB',
    response_bytes < 10240, '1-10 KB',
    response_bytes < 102400, '10-100 KB',
    response_bytes < 1048576, '100 KB - 1 MB',
    '>1 MB')
| summarize Responses = count() by ['Size bucket'] = bucket
| order by Responses desc","size":0,"title":"Response size distribution","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","gridSettings":{"formatters":[]}},"name":"size-dist","customWidth":"50"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Capacity signals
*Where time goes inside each request.* A large gap between wall and CPU time means the request is waiting on the database or external services - scaling app workers will not help; scaling the DB (or caching) will."},"name":"h-cap"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize
    ['Wall p95'] = percentile(duration_ms, 95),
    ['CPU p95'] = percentile(cpu_user_ms + cpu_sys_ms, 95)
    by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"CPU vs wall time (p95, ms) - gap signals IO-bound work","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components"},"name":"cpu-vs-wall"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| where duration_ms > 0
| extend cpu_ratio = (cpu_user_ms + cpu_sys_ms) / duration_ms
| summarize
    Requests = count(),
    ['Avg ratio'] = round(avg(cpu_ratio), 3),
    ['p50 ratio'] = round(percentile(cpu_ratio, 50), 3),
    ['p95 ratio'] = round(percentile(cpu_ratio, 95), 3)
    by ['Route'] = route_template
| top 25 by ['Avg ratio'] asc","size":0,"title":"CPU efficiency (CPU ms / wall ms) - low value = waiting on IO","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","gridSettings":{"formatters":[]}},"name":"cpu-efficiency","customWidth":"50"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
